blockedAssertions.blockedBy: MetricStrip shared-component surface was not reachable on real UI. /dashboard/night is not found and /dashboard did not render MetricStrip expand/collapse charts.
InsightCard did not render on reachable dashboard pages, so dismiss action and conditional no-render state for shared InsightCard could not be exercised on real user surface.
DateNavigation component contract (calendar picker + forward/back arrows + Night/Recovery/Trend toggle) was not available on reachable UI surface.
Could observe empty and loading-like states, but full shared-component state contract (including retryable in-app error path) could not be validated due missing target shared-component surface.

Accessibility checks specific to shared components (chart aria labels, DeltaBadge SR text, InsightCard dismiss keyboard activation) could not be executed because those elements were not present on tested UI.
Responsive behavior for shared strips/annotation markers could not be validated because those components were not rendered; only empty dashboard layout was available across breakpoints.

appliedUpdates.description: Added "Flow Validator Guidance: agent-browser" section with isolation and evidence capture rules for browser-surface validators.
Documented observed local routing constraint for frontend-shared run: /dashboard/night|recovery|trend returned not-found; /dashboard remained reachable.
